title: coleus penicillatus
intro: Coleus penicillatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a tropical plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Himalayan regions of India and Nepal. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coleus penicillatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves can be made into herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
